privileged_info_summary: The refactor_rename_class task operates on a real Android Kotlin project (CalculatorApp) located at /workspace/data/CalculatorApp. The project contains a class named CalcEngine in CalcEngine.kt that must be renamed to Calculator. The CalcEngine class has five methods requiring rename: doAdd→add, doSub→subtract, doMul→multiply, doDiv→divide, and doMod→modulo. CalcActivity.kt references CalcEngine and uses these methods, and all references must be updated after renaming. The project will be copied to /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/CalculatorApp for the refactoring task. The data is not synthetic but rather real Kotlin source code with proper Android project structure.
